visual_description: The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful instrumental track. A rhythmic, percussive beat creates a driving, urgent pace, while low, ominous synthesizer notes build a sense of foreboding and anticipation. The overall mood is serious and dramatic, suggesting a critical or dangerous moment is unfolding. The scene opens with a medium shot from behind a man with short, dark hair. He is wearing a black jacket adorned with a dense pattern of white dots. To the right, another man with short, graying hair is visible in profile, looking towards the first man. The man in the suit jacket is slightly out of focus. The setting is a dimly lit, greenish-hued interior, possibly a room or hallway. The background is blurry and indistinct. In the top left corner, there is a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera is held steady, focusing on the interaction between the two men. The man in the suit jacket turns his head to face the camera, revealing a serious and concerned expression. He is wearing a light-colored collared shirt under his jacket.
